_comment: Configuration-driven Nakshatra profile data (Priority 3.2). Purely descriptive reference data consumed by nakshatraProfileEngine.js — no logic here, matching the existing rules/*.json convention. Lord cycle, Gana, Yoni, Nadi, Symbol and Deity follow standard Parashari references; personality/career/relationship/spiritual tendencies are traditional, hedged interpretive text (not deterministic predictions), consistent with this project's existing narrative tone.

nakshatras.name: Ashwini
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Ashwini (ruled by Ketu) are traditionally described as introspective, detached, and drawn to the unconventional or spiritual side of life.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Ashwini's classical significations traditionally favor research, healing, occult sciences, and behind-the-scenes technical work.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Ashwini natives are traditionally seen as valuing independence and can seem emotionally reserved until deep trust is built.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Ashwini is traditionally associated with a natural pull toward renunciation, meditation, and moksha-oriented practice.

nakshatras.name: Bharani
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Bharani (ruled by Venus) are traditionally described as charming, aesthetically sensitive, and inclined toward harmony and comfort.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Bharani's classical significations traditionally favor arts, design, luxury goods, entertainment, diplomacy, and relationship-facing roles.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Bharani natives are traditionally warm, affectionate, and strongly motivated by partnership and beauty.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Bharani is traditionally associated with devotional practices centered on love, beauty, and Bhakti.

nakshatras.name: Krittika
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Krittika (ruled by Sun) are traditionally described as confident, direct, and inclined toward leadership and recognition.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Krittika's classical significations traditionally favor administration, government, management, and other authority-driven roles.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Krittika natives are traditionally loyal but can be strong-willed, needing mutual respect more than dependence.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Krittika is traditionally associated with a disciplined, self-reliant approach centered on duty (Dharma) and self-realization.

nakshatras.name: Rohini
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Rohini (ruled by Moon) are traditionally described as emotionally sensitive, nurturing, and imaginative.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Rohini's classical significations traditionally favor caregiving professions, hospitality, public-facing communication, and creative fields.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Rohini natives are traditionally deeply caring, seeks emotional security and comfort in close bonds.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Rohini is traditionally associated with an intuitive, devotional inclination that deepens through emotional reflection.

nakshatras.name: Mrigashira
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Mrigashira (ruled by Mars) are traditionally described as energetic, courageous, and action-oriented.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Mrigashira's classical significations traditionally favor engineering, sports, defense, surgery, and other high-energy technical fields.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Mrigashira natives are traditionally passionate and protective, though prone to impatience if not balanced.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Mrigashira is traditionally associated with discipline-driven practice, often expressed through willpower and austerity.

nakshatras.name: Ardra
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Ardra (ruled by Rahu) are traditionally described as ambitious, unconventional, and drawn to novelty or foreign influences.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Ardra's classical significations traditionally favor technology, foreign affairs, unconventional or rapidly evolving fields.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Ardra natives are traditionally intense and magnetic, sometimes restless or unpredictable.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Ardra is traditionally associated with a searching, non-traditional path that often comes later in life.

nakshatras.name: Punarvasu
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Punarvasu (ruled by Jupiter) are traditionally described as optimistic, wise, and generous in outlook.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Punarvasu's classical significations traditionally favor teaching, law, counseling, finance, and other knowledge-based professions.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Punarvasu natives are traditionally supportive and principled, valuing growth and shared values in partnership.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Punarvasu is traditionally associated with a natural inclination toward philosophy, scripture, and guidance from teachers.

nakshatras.name: Pushya
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Pushya (ruled by Saturn) are traditionally described as disciplined, patient, and inclined toward responsibility.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Pushya's classical significations traditionally favor long-term structured work such as administration, labor-intensive trades, and service.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Pushya natives are traditionally steady and committed, though can be slow to open up emotionally.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Pushya is traditionally associated with a mature, disciplined path built through patience, service, and detachment.

nakshatras.name: Ashlesha
nakshatras.personalityTraits: Natives of Ashlesha (ruled by Mercury) are traditionally described as analytical, communicative, and quick to adapt.
nakshatras.careerTendencies: Ashlesha's classical significations traditionally favor commerce, writing, teaching, analysis, and other communication-driven fields.
nakshatras.relationshipTendencies: In relationships, Ashlesha natives are traditionally intellectually engaged, valuing conversation and mental compatibility.
nakshatras.spiritualTendencies: Spiritually, Ashlesha is traditionally associated with a curious, study-driven approach that favors scripture and reasoned inquiry.
